* <<Emily visits>> <<the yoga>> <<studio 4>> <<times a>> <<week. She>> <<spends 1.5>> <<hours each>> <<day practicing>> <<yoga poses.>> <<Additionally, she>> <<also spends>> <<a quarter>> <<of her>> <<yoga practice>> <<time meditating>> <<and doing>> <<breathing exercises>> <<each day.>>
* <<To find>> <<the total>> <<time spent>> <<meditating daily,>> <<we calculate>> <<a quarter>> <<of 1.5>> <<hours which>> <<equals 0.375>> <<hours per>> <<day. This>> <<means her>> <<total daily>> <<time is>> <<1.875 hours.>>
* <<Multiplying the>> <<daily total>> <<of 1.875>> <<hours by>> <<4 days>> <<gives us>> <<7.5 hours>> <<spent at>> <<the studio>> <<each week.>>
* <<Even if>> <<you visit>> <<a local>> <<shop nearby,>> <<remember that>> <<Emily spends>> <<7.5 hours>> <<at her>> <<yoga studio>> <<weekly for>> <<her practice.>>
